10636908.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
10636908.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

10637908.title: CNN Town Hall
10637908.description: President Joe Biden participates in a town hall in Cincinnati, Ohio. Anchor Don Lemon moderates the live event focusing on a wide range of issues facing the nation ranging from Covid-19 to the economy.

10638882.title: Anderson Cooper 360
10638882.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

10640104.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
10640104.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes that use stale bread as the key ingredient.

10641887.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
10641887.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

10642060.title: World Sport
10642060.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10642120.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
10642120.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

10644063.title: World Sport
10644063.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10644127.title: CNN Newsroom with Rosemary Church
10644127.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

10645114.title: CNN Newsroom
10645114.description: Daily headlines and breaking stories live from CNN headquarters in Atlanta. The rotating cast of anchors and contributors include Carol Costello, Kyra Phillips, Suzanne Malveaux, Brooke Baldwin, Don Lemon, Randi Kaye and Fredricka Whitfield.

10646890.title: Early Start
10646890.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

10647107.title: New Day With John Berman and Brianna Keilar
10647107.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

10649912.title: World Sport
10649912.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10650011.title: First Move With Julia Chatterley
10650011.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

10651008.title: Connect the World
10651008.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10651925.title: World Sport
10651925.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

10651975.title: Connect the World
10651975.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

10652990.title: One World with Zain Asher
10652990.description: Offering a fresh and inclusive take on the top stories from Africa, Europe and beyond, giving every continent an equal voice.

10653959.title: Inside Africa
10653959.description: From superbikes to racecars and beyond, highlighting some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels and providing an inside look at what life is like on and off the race track.

10654042.title: Amanpour
10654042.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

10655047.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
10655047.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

10656084.title: Quest Means Business
10656084.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

10657067.title: The Lead With Jake Tapper
10657067.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

10658092.title: The Situation Room With Wolf Blitzer
10658092.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.
